TextView.android:text:
Motivation

1.Set Goals
Set clear and simple goals to keep yourself focused and moving forward.

2.Stay Positive
Keep a positive mindset even when things are difficult.

3.Believe in Yourself
Trust your abilities and know that you can achieve your goals.

4.Keep Going
Do not give up even when progress feels slow.

5.Learn from Mistakes
Mistakes help you grow and become better.

6.Stay Consistent
Small efforts every day lead to big results over time.

7.Surround Yourself Well
Be around people who support and encourage you.

8.Celebrate Progress
Appreciate your achievements no matter how small they are.
